titel: Remarks by Commissioner Jørgensen at the press conference of the Energy Council.
html:
European Commission speech in Luxembourg, June 26, 2026.

Thank you very much, and let me begin by congratulating the presidency for their hard work and the highly impressive results they have achieved.

Yo...
tldr: A representative from the leadership of the European Union expressed their gratitude for the hard work and excellent results achieved by the council.
lattlast:
Commissioner Jørgensen, representing the European Commission (the executive body of the EU), delivered a speech in Luxembourg on June 26, 2026. In her speech, she expressed gratitude to those responsible for their work.

She particularly praised the results achieved by the council during its term. This was a positive message to the individuals who have been working on these issues.

The text does not contain any specific decisions regarding funding or projects; rather, it is a formal expression of thanks and recognition for the work that has already been completed.
